title: Icon Leading Tooltip
body: ## Places the icons in attribute's tooltip to the beginning! - Before and after: ## Resourcepack used: - [Attribute Icons (RPG Series)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/attribute-icons-rpg-series-resource-pack) ### Compatibility: - Works with [Dynamic Tooltips](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-tooltips) (Recommended) - Better Combat - Tiered - Trinkets
